import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBAccordionItem,DBInfotext,DBAccordion, type DBAccordionProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBAccordion> = {
	title: 'Components/DBAccordion/Behavior',
	component: DBAccordion,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"behavior":{"control":"select","options":["multiple","single"]},"variant":{"control":"select","options":["divider","card"]},"initOpenIndex":{"control":"object"},"items":{"control":"object"},"name":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBAccordion>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const Multiple: Story = {
	args: {
	"behavior": "multiple",
"children":<><DBAccordionItem  headlinePlain="Item 1">
						Content 1
					</DBAccordionItem><DBAccordionItem  headlinePlain="Item 2">
						Content 2
					</DBAccordionItem><DBAccordionItem  headlinePlain="Item 3">
						Content 3
					</DBAccordionItem></>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div><DBInfotext  size="small"  semantic="informational"  icon="none">
					(Default) Multiple
				</DBInfotext><DBAccordion  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const Single: Story = {
	args: {
	"behavior": "single",
"children":<><DBAccordionItem  headlinePlain="Item 1">
						Content 1
					</DBAccordionItem><DBAccordionItem  headlinePlain="Item 2">
						Content 2
					</DBAccordionItem><DBAccordionItem  headlinePlain="Item 3">
						Content 3
					</DBAccordionItem></>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div><DBInfotext  size="small"  semantic="informational"  icon="none">
					Single

	),
};

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBAccordionItem, type DBAccordionItemProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBAccordionItem> = {
	title: 'Components/DBAccordionItem/Density',
	component: DBAccordionItem,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"headlinePlain":{"control":"text"},"disabled":{"control":"boolean"},"defaultOpen":{"control":"boolean"},"text":{"control":"text"},"name":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBAccordionItem>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const Functional: Story = {
	args: {
	"data-density": "functional",
"headlinePlain": "Functional",
"children":"Functional"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div><DBAccordionItem  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const DefaultRegular: Story = {
	args: {
	"data-density": "regular",
"headlinePlain": "(Default) Regular",
"children":"(Default) Regular"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div><DBAccordionItem  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const Expressive: Story = {
	args: {
	"data-density": "expressive",
"headlinePlain": "Expressive",
"children":"Expressive"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div><DBAccordionItem  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};

import { DBIcon,DBInfotext,DBBadge, type DBBadgeProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBBadge> = {
	title: 'Components/DBBadge/BadgeExamples',
	component: DBBadge,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBBadge>;

export default meta;

"children":"9"

};

};

};

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBButton,DBIcon,DBInfotext,DBBadge, type DBBadgeProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBBadge> = {
	title: 'Components/DBBadge/Placement',
	component: DBBadge,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"emphasis":{"control":"select","options":["weak","strong"]},"semantic":{"control":"select","options":["adaptive","neutral","critical","informational","warning","successful"]},"size":{"control":"select","options":["small","medium"]},"placement":{"control":"select","options":["inline","corner-top-left","corner-top-right","corner-center-left","corner-center-right","corner-bottom-left","corner-bottom-right"]},"label":{"control":"text"},"text":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBBadge>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const DefaultInline: Story = {
	args: {
	"size": "small",
"emphasis": "strong",
"semantic": "critical",
"children":"Label"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div className="badge-inline-container"><span  data-icon="x_placeholder">(Default) Inline</span><DBBadge  {...properties}  /><DBIcon  icon="error"  /></div>
	),
};
export const CornerTopLeft: Story = {
	args: {
	"size": "small",
"emphasis": "strong",
"semantic": "critical",
"placement": "corner-top-left"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div><DBButton  data-sb-decorator="true"  icon="x_placeholder"  variant="outlined"  noText><DBBadge  {...properties}  />
					Corner - Top - Left
				</DBButton><DBInfotext  size="small"  semantic="informational"  icon="none">
					Corner - Top - Left
				</DBInfotext></div>
	),
};
export const CornerCenterLeft: Story = {
	args: {
	"size": "small",
"emphasis": "strong",
"semantic": "critical",
"placement": "corner-center-left"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div><DBButton  data-sb-decorator="true"  icon="x_placeholder"  variant="outlined"  noText><DBBadge  {...properties}  />
					Corner - Center - Left

				</DBInfotext></div>
	),
};
export const CornerBottomLeft: Story = {
	args: {
	"size": "small",
"emphasis": "strong",
"semantic": "critical",
"placement": "corner-bottom-left"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div><DBButton  data-sb-decorator="true"  icon="x_placeholder"  variant="outlined"  noText><DBBadge  {...properties}  />
					Corner - Bottom- Left
				</DBButton><DBInfotext  size="small"  semantic="informational"  icon="none">

	),
};

	args: {
	"size": "small",
"emphasis": "strong",
"semantic": "critical",

	},

const meta: Meta<typeof DBBrand> = {
	title: 'Components/DBBrand/Density',
	component: DBBrand,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"hideLogo":{"control":"boolean"},"showIcon":{"control":"boolean"},"text":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBBrand>;

"children":"Functional"

		<DBBrand  {...properties}  />

};

	),

		<DBBrand  {...properties}  />
	),
};

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBBrand, type DBBrandProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBBrand> = {
	title: 'Components/DBBrand/Variants',
	component: DBBrand,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"hideLogo":{"control":"boolean"},"showIcon":{"control":"boolean"},"text":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBBrand>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const DefaultWithLogo: Story = {
	args: {
	"children":"(Default) With Logo"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBBrand  {...properties}  />
	),
};
export const NoLogo: Story = {
	args: {
	"hideLogo": true,
"children":"No Logo"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBBrand  {...properties}  />
	),
};
export const CustomLogo: Story = {
	args: {
	"hideLogo": true,
"children":<><img  alt="this is a fancy placeholder logo"  src={getImage()}  />Custom Logo</>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBBrand  {...properties}  />
	),
};

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBButton, type DBButtonProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBButton> = {
	title: 'Components/DBButton/Density',
	component: DBButton,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	args: {
	"onClick": fn()
	},
	argTypes: {"variant":{"control":"select","options":["outlined","brand","ghost","filled"]},"disabled":{"control":"boolean"},"form":{"control":"text"},"name":{"control":"text"},"noText":{"control":"boolean"},"wrap":{"control":"boolean"},"type":{"control":"select","options":["button","reset","submit"]},"value":{"control":"text"},"showIcon":{"control":"boolean"},"showIconLeading":{"control":"boolean"},"showIconTrailing":{"control":"boolean"},"width":{"control":"select","options":["full","auto"]},"size":{"control":"select","options":["small","medium"]},"text":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"},"onClick":{"action":"onClick"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBButton>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const Functional: Story = {
	args: {
	"data-density": "functional",
"onClick": fn(),
"children":"Functional"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBButton  {...properties}  />
	),
};
export const Regular: Story = {
	args: {
	"data-density": "regular",
"onClick": fn(),
"children":"(Default) Regular"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBButton  {...properties}  />
	),
};
export const Expressive: Story = {
	args: {
	"data-density": "expressive",
"onClick": fn(),
"children":"Expressive"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBButton  {...properties}  />
	),
};

	title: 'Components/DBButton/Disabled',
	component: DBButton,
	
	parameters: {

	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	args: {
	"onClick": fn()
	},
	argTypes: {"variant":{"control":"select","options":["outlined","brand","ghost","filled"]},"disabled":{"control":"boolean"},"form":{"control":"text"},"name":{"control":"text"},"noText":{"control":"boolean"},"wrap":{"control":"boolean"},"type":{"control":"select","options":["button","reset","submit"]},"value":{"control":"text"},"showIcon":{"control":"boolean"},"showIconLeading":{"control":"boolean"},"showIconTrailing":{"control":"boolean"},"width":{"control":"select","options":["full","auto"]},"size":{"control":"select","options":["small","medium"]},"text":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"},"onClick":{"action":"onClick"}}

./src/components/button/examples/multi-line-text.example.stories.tsx:
import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBButton, type DBButtonProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBButton> = {
	title: 'Components/DBButton/Multi Line Text',
	component: DBButton,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	args: {
	"onClick": fn()
	},
	argTypes: {"variant":{"control":"select","options":["outlined","brand","ghost","filled"]},"disabled":{"control":"boolean"},"form":{"control":"text"},"name":{"control":"text"},"noText":{"control":"boolean"},"wrap":{"control":"boolean"},"type":{"control":"select","options":["button","reset","submit"]},"value":{"control":"text"},"showIcon":{"control":"boolean"},"showIconLeading":{"control":"boolean"},"showIconTrailing":{"control":"boolean"},"width":{"control":"select","options":["full","auto"]},"size":{"control":"select","options":["small","medium"]},"text":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"},"onClick":{"action":"onClick"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBButton>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const AutomaticLineBreaks: Story = {
	args: {
	"width": "full",
"onClick": fn(),
"children":"Multi-line Text With Automatic Line Breaks"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBButton  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const AutomaticLineBreaksandIcon: Story = {
	args: {
	"width": "full",
"icon": "x_placeholder",
"onClick": fn(),
"children":"Multi-line Text With Automatic Line Breaks and Icon"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBButton  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const SmallAutomaticLineBreaks: Story = {
	args: {
	"size": "small",
"onClick": fn(),
"children":"Button Small Multi-line Text With Automatic Line Breaks"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBButton  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBCard, type DBCardProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBCard> = {
	title: 'Components/DBCard/Behavior',
	component: DBCard,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	args: {
	"onClick": fn()
	},
	argTypes: {"behavior":{"control":"select","options":["static","interactive"]},"elevationLevel":{"control":"select","options":["1","2","3"]},"spacing":{"control":"select","options":["medium","small","large","none"]},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"},"onClick":{"action":"onClick"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBCard>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const DefaultStatic: Story = {
	args: {
	"behavior": "static",
"children":<strong>(Default) Static</strong>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBCard  {...properties}  />
	),
};
export const Interactive: Story = {
	args: {
	"behavior": "interactive",
"children":<strong>Interactive</strong>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<button  type="button"><DBCard  {...properties}  /></button>
	),
};

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBCard, type DBCardProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBCard> = {
	title: 'Components/DBCard/Density',
	component: DBCard,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	args: {
	"onClick": fn()
	},
	argTypes: {"behavior":{"control":"select","options":["static","interactive"]},"elevationLevel":{"control":"select","options":["1","2","3"]},"spacing":{"control":"select","options":["medium","small","large","none"]},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"},"onClick":{"action":"onClick"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBCard>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const Functional: Story = {
	args: {
	"data-density": "functional",
"children":<strong>Functional</strong>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBCard  {...properties}  />
	),
};
export const DefaultRegular: Story = {
	args: {
	"data-density": "regular",
"children":<strong>(Default) Regular</strong>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBCard  {...properties}  />
	),
};
export const Expressive: Story = {
	args: {
	"data-density": "expressive",
"children":<strong>Expressive</strong>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBCard  {...properties}  />
	),
};
Info

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBCard, type DBCardProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBCard> = {
	title: 'Components/DBCard/Elevation Level',
	component: DBCard,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	args: {
	"onClick": fn()
	},
	argTypes: {"behavior":{"control":"select","options":["static","interactive"]},"elevationLevel":{"control":"select","options":["1","2","3"]},"spacing":{"control":"select","options":["medium","small","large","none"]},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"},"onClick":{"action":"onClick"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBCard>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const DefaultLevel1: Story = {
	args: {
	"elevationLevel": "1",
"children":<strong>(Default) 1</strong>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBCard  {...properties}  />
	),
};
export const Level2: Story = {
	args: {
	"elevationLevel": "2",
"children":<strong>2</strong>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBCard  {...properties}  />
	),
};
export const Level3: Story = {
	args: {
	"elevationLevel": "3",
"children":<strong>3</strong>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBCard  {...properties}  />

./src/components/card/examples/example.example.stories.tsx:
import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBCard, type DBCardProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBCard> = {
	title: 'Components/DBCard/Example',
	component: DBCard,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	args: {
	"onClick": fn()
	},
	argTypes: {"behavior":{"control":"select","options":["static","interactive"]},"elevationLevel":{"control":"select","options":["1","2","3"]},"spacing":{"control":"select","options":["medium","small","large","none"]},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"},"onClick":{"action":"onClick"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBCard>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const Level1Interactive: Story = {
	args: {
	"elevationLevel": "1",
"behavior": "interactive",
"children":<strong>Level 1 - Interactive</strong>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<button  type="button"><DBCard  {...properties}  /></button>
	),
};
export const Level2Interactive: Story = {
	args: {
	"elevationLevel": "2",
"behavior": "interactive",
"children":<strong>Level 2 - Interactive</strong>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<button  type="button"><DBCard  {...properties}  /></button>
	),
};
export const Level3Interactive: Story = {
	args: {
	"elevationLevel": "3",
"behavior": "interactive",
"children":<strong>Level 3 - Interactive</strong>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<button  type="button"><DBCard  {...properties}  /></button>
	),
};

import { DBCheckbox, type DBCheckboxProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBCheckbox> = {
	title: 'Components/DBCheckbox/Checked',
	component: DBCheckbox,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"name":{"control":"text"},"disabled":{"control":"boolean"},"checked":{"control":"boolean"},"indeterminate":{"control":"boolean"},"validation":{"control":"select","options":["invalid","valid","no-validation"]},"invalidMessage":{"control":"text"},"validMessage":{"control":"text"},"message":{"control":"text"},"showMessage":{"control":"boolean"},"size":{"control":"select","options":["small","medium"]},"required":{"control":"boolean"},"showLabel":{"control":"boolean"},"showRequiredAsterisk":{"control":"boolean"},"label":{"control":"text"},"placeholder":{"control":"text"},"variant":{"control":"select","options":["above","floating"]},"value":{"control":"text"},"form":{"control":"text"},"ariaDescribedBy":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}

type Story = StoryObj;

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBInfotext,DBCheckbox, type DBCheckboxProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBCheckbox> = {
	title: 'Components/DBCheckbox/Show Label',
	component: DBCheckbox,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"name":{"control":"text"},"disabled":{"control":"boolean"},"checked":{"control":"boolean"},"indeterminate":{"control":"boolean"},"validation":{"control":"select","options":["invalid","valid","no-validation"]},"invalidMessage":{"control":"text"},"validMessage":{"control":"text"},"message":{"control":"text"},"showMessage":{"control":"boolean"},"size":{"control":"select","options":["small","medium"]},"required":{"control":"boolean"},"showLabel":{"control":"boolean"},"showRequiredAsterisk":{"control":"boolean"},"label":{"control":"text"},"placeholder":{"control":"text"},"variant":{"control":"select","options":["above","floating"]},"value":{"control":"text"},"form":{"control":"text"},"ariaDescribedBy":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBCheckbox>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const DefaultTrue: Story = {
	args: {
	"name": "Label",
"showLabel": true,
"children":"(Default) True"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBCheckbox  {...properties}  />
	),
};
export const False: Story = {

	"name": "Label",
"showLabel": false,
"children":"False"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div><DBCheckbox  {...properties}  /><DBInfotext  semantic="informational"  size="small"  icon="none">

				</DBInfotext></div>
	),
};

import { DBCheckbox, type DBCheckboxProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBCheckbox> = {
	title: 'Components/DBCheckbox/Validation',
	component: DBCheckbox,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"name":{"control":"text"},"disabled":{"control":"boolean"},"checked":{"control":"boolean"},"indeterminate":{"control":"boolean"},"validation":{"control":"select","options":["invalid","valid","no-validation"]},"invalidMessage":{"control":"text"},"validMessage":{"control":"text"},"message":{"control":"text"},"showMessage":{"control":"boolean"},"size":{"control":"select","options":["small","medium"]},"required":{"control":"boolean"},"showLabel":{"control":"boolean"},"showRequiredAsterisk":{"control":"boolean"},"label":{"control":"text"},"placeholder":{"control":"text"},"variant":{"control":"select","options":["above","floating"]},"value":{"control":"text"},"form":{"control":"text"},"ariaDescribedBy":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBCheckbox>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const DefaultNovalidation: Story = {
	args: {
	"name": "Validation",
"validation": "no-validation",
"children":"(Default) No validation"
	},

		<DBCheckbox  {...properties}  />
	),
};

	args: {
	"name": "Validation",
"validation": "invalid",
"invalidMessage": "Invalid Message",

	},

	),
};
export const Valid: Story = {
	args: {
	"name": "Validation",
"validation": "valid",
"validMessage": "Valid message",
"children":"Valid"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBCheckbox  {...properties}  />
	),
};

import { DBInfotext,DBCustomButton, type DBCustomButtonProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBCustomButton> = {
	title: 'Components/DBCustomButton/Density',
	component: DBCustomButton,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"variant":{"control":"select","options":["outlined","brand","ghost","filled"]},"noText":{"control":"boolean"},"wrap":{"control":"boolean"},"showIcon":{"control":"boolean"},"showIconLeading":{"control":"boolean"},"showIconTrailing":{"control":"boolean"},"width":{"control":"select","options":["full","auto"]},"size":{"control":"select","options":["small","medium"]},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBCustomButton>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const FunctionalButton: Story = {
	args: {
	"data-density": "functional",
"children":<button  type="button">Button</button>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (

	),
};

	args: {

		<DBCustomButton  {...properties}  />
	),
};

	args: {
	"data-density": "functional",
"children":<a  href="#">Link</a>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBCustomButton  {...properties}  />
	),
};

	args: {
	"data-density": "regular",
"children":<button  type="button">Button</button>

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

  width: '300px'
}}><DBCustomButton  {...properties}  /></div>

  width: '300px'
}}><DBCustomButton  {...properties}  /></div>

import { DBButton,DBDrawer, type DBDrawerProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBDrawer> = {
	title: 'Components/DBDrawer/Density',
	component: DBDrawer,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	args: {
	"onClose": fn()
	},
	argTypes: {"open":{"control":"boolean"},"width":{"control":"select","options":["full","auto"]},"rounded":{"control":"boolean"},"spacing":{"control":"select","options":["medium","small","large","none"]},"backdrop":{"control":"select","options":["none","strong","weak","invisible"]},"direction":{"control":"select","options":["left","right","up","down"]},"variant":{"control":"select","options":["modal","inside"]},"position":{"control":"select","options":["fixed","absolute"]},"closeButtonId":{"control":"text"},"closeButtonText":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"},"onClose":{"action":"onClose"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBDrawer>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const Functional: Story = {
	args: {
	"open": false,
"onClose": fn(),
"children":"Functional"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  data-density="functional">Open DBDrawer by switching open property<DBDrawer  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};

	args: {
	"open": false,
"onClose": fn(),
"children":"(Default) Regular"
	},

	),
};

	args: {
	"open": false,
"onClose": fn(),

	},

	),

./src/components/header/examples/behavior.example.stories.tsx:
import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBBrand,DBButton,DBLink,DBNavigationItem,DBNavigation,DBHeader, type DBHeaderProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBHeader> = {
	title: 'Components/DBHeader/Behavior',
	component: DBHeader,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"width":{"control":"select","options":["full","medium","large","small"]},"forceMobile":{"control":"boolean"},"drawerOpen":{"control":"boolean"},"burgerMenuLabel":{"control":"text"},"closeButtonId":{"control":"text"},"closeButtonText":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBHeader>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const Desktopfullwidth: Story = {
	args: {
	"brand": <DBBrand>DBHeader</DBBrand>,
"metaNavigation": <>
							<DBLink href="#">Imprint</DBLink>
							<DBLink href="#">Help</DBLink>
						</>,
"primaryAction": <DBButton icon="magnifying_glass" variant="ghost" noText>
							Search
						</DBButton>,
"secondaryAction": <>
							<DBButton icon="x_placeholder" variant="ghost" noText>
								Profile
							</DBButton>
							<DBButton icon="x_placeholder" variant="ghost" noText>
								Notification
							</DBButton>
							<DBButton icon="x_placeholder" variant="ghost" noText>
								Help
							</DBButton>
						</>,
"children":<DBNavigation  aria-label="Desktop (full width)"  {...({})}><DBNavigationItem  icon="x_placeholder"><a  href="#">Desktop (full width)</a></DBNavigationItem><DBNavigationItem  disabled><a  href="#">Desktop (full width) disabled</a></DBNavigationItem></DBNavigation>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '100%',
  display: 'block'
}}><DBHeader  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const Mobile: Story = {
	args: {
	"forceMobile": "true",
"brand": <DBBrand>DBHeader</DBBrand>,
"metaNavigation": <>
							<DBLink href="#">Imprint</DBLink>
							<DBLink href="#">Help</DBLink>
						</>,
"primaryAction": <DBButton icon="magnifying_glass" variant="ghost" noText>
							Search
						</DBButton>,
"secondaryAction": <>
							<DBButton icon="x_placeholder" variant="ghost" noText>
								Profile
							</DBButton>
							<DBButton icon="x_placeholder" variant="ghost" noText>
								Notification
							</DBButton>
							<DBButton icon="x_placeholder" variant="ghost" noText>
								Help
							</DBButton>
						</>,
"children":<DBNavigation  aria-label="Mobile"  {...({})}><DBNavigationItem  icon="x_placeholder"><a  href="#">Mobile</a></DBNavigationItem><DBNavigationItem  disabled><a  href="#">Mobile disabled</a></DBNavigationItem></DBNavigation>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '100%',
  display: 'block'
}}><DBHeader  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};

import { DBBrand,DBNavigationItem,DBNavigation,DBHeader, type DBHeaderProps } from '@components';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBHeader> = {
	title: 'Components/DBHeader/Examples',

	parameters: {

	argTypes: {"width":{"control":"select","options":["full","medium","large","small"]},"forceMobile":{"control":"boolean"},"drawerOpen":{"control":"boolean"},"burgerMenuLabel":{"control":"text"},"closeButtonId":{"control":"text"},"closeButtonText":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBHeader>;

import { DBBrand,DBButton,DBLink,DBNavigationItem,DBNavigation,DBHeader, type DBHeaderProps } from '@components';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBHeader> = {
	title: 'Components/DBHeader/Width',
	component: DBHeader,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"width":{"control":"select","options":["full","medium","large","small"]},"forceMobile":{"control":"boolean"},"drawerOpen":{"control":"boolean"},"burgerMenuLabel":{"control":"text"},"closeButtonId":{"control":"text"},"closeButtonText":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}

  width: '100%',
  display: 'block'

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBInfotext,DBIcon, type DBIconProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBIcon> = {
	title: 'Components/DBIcon/Density',
	component: DBIcon,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"icon":{"control":"select","options":["arrow_down","arrow_left","arrow_right","arrow_up","arrow_up_right","brand","calendar","check-circle","check","check_circle","chevron_down","chevron_left","chevron_right","chevron_up","circle","circular_arrows","clock","cross","cross_circle","exclamation_mark_circle","exclamation_mark_triangle","information_circle","magnifying_glass","menu","minus","plus","resize_handle_corner","x_placeholder"]},"variant":{"control":"text"},"weight":{"control":"select","options":["16","20","24","32","48","64"]},"text":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBIcon>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const Functional: Story = {
	args: {
	"icon": "x_placeholder",
"children":"Functional"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  data-density="functional"><DBInfotext  icon="none"  size="small"  semantic="informational">

	),
};

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBInput, type DBInputProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBInput> = {
	title: 'Components/DBInput/Datalist and Typeahead Examples',
	component: DBInput,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"label":{"control":"text"},"variant":{"control":"select","options":["above","floating"]},"value":{"control":"text"},"showLabel":{"control":"boolean"},"message":{"control":"text"},"showMessage":{"control":"boolean"},"disabled":{"control":"boolean"},"readOnly":{"control":"boolean"},"validation":{"control":"select","options":["invalid","valid","no-validation"]},"invalidMessage":{"control":"text"},"validMessage":{"control":"text"},"required":{"control":"boolean"},"showRequiredAsterisk":{"control":"boolean"},"showIcon":{"control":"boolean"},"showIconLeading":{"control":"boolean"},"showIconTrailing":{"control":"boolean"},"minLength":{"control":"number"},"maxLength":{"control":"number"},"type":{"control":"select","options":["color","date","datetime-local","email","file","hidden","month","number","password","range","search","tel","text","time","url","week"]},"min":{"control":"text"},"max":{"control":"text"},"step":{"control":"text"},"dataList":{"control":"object"},"dataListId":{"control":"text"},"placeholder":{"control":"text"},"name":{"control":"text"},"form":{"control":"text"},"ariaDescribedBy":{"control":"text"},"size":{"control":"number"},"pattern":{"control":"text"},"accept":{"control":"text"},"multiple":{"control":"boolean"},"enterkeyhint":{"control":"select","options":["enter","done","go","next","previous","search","send"]},"inputmode":{"control":"select","options":["none","text","decimal","numeric","tel","search","email","url"]},"autocomplete":{"control":"text"},"messageIcon":{"control":"text"},"messageSize":{"control":"select","options":["small","medium"]},"validMessageSize":{"control":"select","options":["small","medium"]},"invalidMessageSize":{"control":"select","options":["small","medium"]},"fieldSizing":{"control":"select","options":["fixed","content"]},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBInput>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const SimpleStringList: Story = {
	args: {
	"label": "Search Cities",
"placeholder": "Type to search...",
"variant": "floating",
"dataList": [{
  value: 'test1',
  label: 'Test 1'
}, {
  value: 'test2',
  label: 'Test 2'
}]
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBInput  {...properties}  />
	),
};
export const RegularVariantwithDatalist: Story = {
	args: {
	"label": "Search Products",
"placeholder": "Regular Variant with Datalist",
"dataList": [{
  value: 'test1',
  label: 'Test 1'
}, {
  value: 'test2',
  label: 'Test 2'
}]
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBInput  {...properties}  />
	),
};
export const WithSearchIcon: Story = {
	args: {
	"label": "Search Stations",
"placeholder": "Type to search...",
"variant": "floating",
"type": "search",
"icon": "magnifying_glass",
"dataList": ['Test 1', 'Test 2'],
"showIcon": true
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBInput  {...properties}  />
	),
};

	),

import { DBInput, type DBInputProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBInput> = {
	title: 'Components/DBInput/Example - Types with min and max',
	component: DBInput,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"label":{"control":"text"},"variant":{"control":"select","options":["above","floating"]},"value":{"control":"text"},"showLabel":{"control":"boolean"},"message":{"control":"text"},"showMessage":{"control":"boolean"},"disabled":{"control":"boolean"},"readOnly":{"control":"boolean"},"validation":{"control":"select","options":["invalid","valid","no-validation"]},"invalidMessage":{"control":"text"},"validMessage":{"control":"text"},"required":{"control":"boolean"},"showRequiredAsterisk":{"control":"boolean"},"showIcon":{"control":"boolean"},"showIconLeading":{"control":"boolean"},"showIconTrailing":{"control":"boolean"},"minLength":{"control":"number"},"maxLength":{"control":"number"},"type":{"control":"select","options":["color","date","datetime-local","email","file","hidden","month","number","password","range","search","tel","text","time","url","week"]},"min":{"control":"text"},"max":{"control":"text"},"step":{"control":"text"},"dataList":{"control":"object"},"dataListId":{"control":"text"},"placeholder":{"control":"text"},"name":{"control":"text"},"form":{"control":"text"},"ariaDescribedBy":{"control":"text"},"size":{"control":"number"},"pattern":{"control":"text"},"accept":{"control":"text"},"multiple":{"control":"boolean"},"enterkeyhint":{"control":"select","options":["enter","done","go","next","previous","search","send"]},"inputmode":{"control":"select","options":["none","text","decimal","numeric","tel","search","email","url"]},"autocomplete":{"control":"text"},"messageIcon":{"control":"text"},"messageSize":{"control":"select","options":["small","medium"]},"validMessageSize":{"control":"select","options":["small","medium"]},"invalidMessageSize":{"control":"select","options":["small","medium"]},"fieldSizing":{"control":"select","options":["fixed","content"]},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}

	args: {
	"label": "Label",
"placeholder": "(Default) Text"

	args: {
	"label": "Label",
"type": "password",
"placeholder": "Password"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBInput  {...properties}  />
	),

	args: {
	"label": "Label",
"type": "search",
"placeholder": "Search"
	},

	args: {

"type": "email",

	),
};

	args: {

	args: {

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBInfotext,DBNavigationItem,DBNavigation, type DBNavigationProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBNavigation> = {
	title: 'Components/DBNavigation/Density',
	component: DBNavigation,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBNavigation>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const Functional: Story = {
	args: {
	"aria-labelledby": "functional",
"children":<><DBNavigationItem  subNavigation={<><DBNavigationItem  subNavigation={<><DBNavigationItem><a  href="#"  aria-current="page">
													Sub-Sub-Navi-Item 1
												</a></DBNavigationItem>
<DBNavigationItem><a  href="#">
													Sub-Sub-Navi-Item 2
												</a></DBNavigationItem></>}>
									Sub-Navi-Item 1
								</DBNavigationItem>
<DBNavigationItem><a  href="#">Sub-Navi-Item 2</a></DBNavigationItem></>}>
						Navi-Item 1
					</DBNavigationItem><DBNavigationItem  icon="x_placeholder"><a  href="#">Navi-Item 2</a></DBNavigationItem><DBNavigationItem  disabled><a  href="#">Navi-Item 3</a></DBNavigationItem></>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div className="fit-content-container"  data-density="functional"><DBInfotext  id="functional"  size="small"  semantic="informational"  icon="none">
					Functional
				</DBInfotext><DBNavigation  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const DefaultRegular: Story = {
	args: {
	"aria-labelledby": "_default__regular",
"children":<><DBNavigationItem  subNavigation={<><DBNavigationItem  subNavigation={<><DBNavigationItem><a  href="#"  aria-current="page">
													Sub-Sub-Navi-Item 1
												</a></DBNavigationItem>
<DBNavigationItem><a  href="#">
													Sub-Sub-Navi-Item 2
												</a></DBNavigationItem></>}>
									Sub-Navi-Item 1
								</DBNavigationItem>
<DBNavigationItem><a  href="#">Sub-Navi-Item 2</a></DBNavigationItem></>}>
						Navi-Item 1
					</DBNavigationItem><DBNavigationItem  icon="x_placeholder"><a  href="#">Navi-Item 2</a></DBNavigationItem><DBNavigationItem  disabled><a  href="#">Navi-Item 3</a></DBNavigationItem></>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div className="fit-content-container"  data-density="regular"><DBInfotext  id="_default__regular"  size="small"  semantic="informational"  icon="none">
					(Default) Regular
				</DBInfotext><DBNavigation  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const Expressive: Story = {
	args: {
	"aria-labelledby": "expressive",
"children":<><DBNavigationItem  subNavigation={<><DBNavigationItem  subNavigation={<><DBNavigationItem><a  href="#"  aria-current="page">

"subNavigation": <>

"wrap": true,
"children":"This is a very long text that is broken into multiple lines."

  width: '200px'
}}><DBNavigationItem  {...properties}  /></ul>

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBLink,DBNotification, type DBNotificationProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBNotification> = {
	title: 'Components/DBNotification/Examples - Variant:Docked',
	component: DBNotification,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	args: {
	"onClose": fn()
	},
	argTypes: {"headline":{"control":"text"},"showIcon":{"control":"boolean"},"variant":{"control":"select","options":["docked","standalone","overlay"]},"semantic":{"control":"select","options":["adaptive","neutral","critical","informational","warning","successful"]},"closeable":{"control":"boolean"},"linkVariant":{"control":"select","options":["block","inline"]},"showHeadline":{"control":"boolean"},"showTimestamp":{"control":"boolean"},"timestamp":{"control":"text"},"ariaLive":{"control":"select","options":["assertive","polite","off"]},"text":{"control":"text"},"role":{"control":"text"},"closeButtonId":{"control":"text"},"closeButtonText":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"},"onClose":{"action":"onClose"}}

  width: '300px'

	"icon": "information_circle",
"children":"Text & Icon"

	),
};

	args: {
	"image": <img src="/assets/images/placeholder.jpg" alt="this is a fancy placeholder" />,
"children":"Text & Preview Image"

		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBNotification  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};

	args: {
	"headline": "Headline",
"children":"Text & Headline"

  width: '300px'
}}><DBNotification  {...properties}  /></div>
	),

  width: '300px'
}}><DBNotification  {...properties}  /></div>

  width: '300px'
}}><DBNotification  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBLink,DBNotification, type DBNotificationProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBNotification> = {
	title: 'Components/DBNotification/Examples - Variant:Standalone',
	component: DBNotification,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	args: {
	"onClose": fn()
	},
	argTypes: {"headline":{"control":"text"},"showIcon":{"control":"boolean"},"variant":{"control":"select","options":["docked","standalone","overlay"]},"semantic":{"control":"select","options":["adaptive","neutral","critical","informational","warning","successful"]},"closeable":{"control":"boolean"},"linkVariant":{"control":"select","options":["block","inline"]},"showHeadline":{"control":"boolean"},"showTimestamp":{"control":"boolean"},"timestamp":{"control":"text"},"ariaLive":{"control":"select","options":["assertive","polite","off"]},"text":{"control":"text"},"role":{"control":"text"},"closeButtonId":{"control":"text"},"closeButtonText":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"},"onClose":{"action":"onClose"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBNotification>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const Text: Story = {
	args: {
	"variant": "standalone",
"children":"Text"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBNotification  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBNotification, type DBNotificationProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBNotification> = {
	title: 'Components/DBNotification/Show Timestamp',
	component: DBNotification,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	args: {
	"onClose": fn()
	},
	argTypes: {"headline":{"control":"text"},"showIcon":{"control":"boolean"},"variant":{"control":"select","options":["docked","standalone","overlay"]},"semantic":{"control":"select","options":["adaptive","neutral","critical","informational","warning","successful"]},"closeable":{"control":"boolean"},"linkVariant":{"control":"select","options":["block","inline"]},"showHeadline":{"control":"boolean"},"showTimestamp":{"control":"boolean"},"timestamp":{"control":"text"},"ariaLive":{"control":"select","options":["assertive","polite","off"]},"text":{"control":"text"},"role":{"control":"text"},"closeButtonId":{"control":"text"},"closeButtonText":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"},"onClose":{"action":"onClose"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBNotification>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const DefaultFalse: Story = {
	args: {
	"variant": "overlay",
"timestamp": "10 min ago",
"showTimestamp": false,
"children":"(Default) False"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBNotification  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const True: Story = {
	args: {
	"variant": "overlay",
"timestamp": "10 min ago",
"showTimestamp": true,
"children":"True"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBNotification  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};

import { DBNotification, type DBNotificationProps } from '@components';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBNotification> = {
	title: 'Components/DBNotification/Variant',
	component: DBNotification,
	
	parameters: {

	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	args: {
	"onClose": fn()

	argTypes: {"headline":{"control":"text"},"showIcon":{"control":"boolean"},"variant":{"control":"select","options":["docked","standalone","overlay"]},"semantic":{"control":"select","options":["adaptive","neutral","critical","informational","warning","successful"]},"closeable":{"control":"boolean"},"linkVariant":{"control":"select","options":["block","inline"]},"showHeadline":{"control":"boolean"},"showTimestamp":{"control":"boolean"},"timestamp":{"control":"text"},"ariaLive":{"control":"select","options":["assertive","polite","off"]},"text":{"control":"text"},"role":{"control":"text"},"closeButtonId":{"control":"text"},"closeButtonText":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"},"onClose":{"action":"onClose"}}

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;

import { DBButton,DBPopover, type DBPopoverProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBPopover> = {
	title: 'Components/DBPopover/Animation',
	component: DBPopover,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"id":{"control":"text"},"spacing":{"control":"select","options":["medium","small","large","none"]},"placement":{"control":"select","options":["top","bottom","top-start","top-end","bottom-start","bottom-end","left","right","left-start","left-end","right-start","right-end"]},"gap":{"control":"boolean"},"animation":{"control":"boolean"},"delay":{"control":"select","options":["none","slow","fast"]},"width":{"control":"select","options":["auto","fixed"]},"open":{"control":"boolean"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBPopover>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const DefaultTrue: Story = {
	args: {
	"id": "popover-13",
"animation": true,
"trigger": <DBButton>(Default) True</DBButton>,
"children":<><ul className="popover-list"><li>Popover Custom Item 1</li><li>Popover Custom Item 2</li></ul>
<DBButton>Popover Custom Item 3</DBButton></>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBPopover  {...properties}  />

};

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBSelect, type DBSelectProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBSelect> = {
	title: 'Components/DBSelect/Examples Floating Label',
	component: DBSelect,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	args: {
	"onClick": fn()
	},
	argTypes: {"options":{"control":"object"},"label":{"control":"text"},"placeholder":{"control":"text"},"variant":{"control":"select","options":["above","floating"]},"value":{"control":"text"},"showLabel":{"control":"boolean"},"message":{"control":"text"},"showMessage":{"control":"boolean"},"validation":{"control":"select","options":["invalid","valid","no-validation"]},"invalidMessage":{"control":"text"},"validMessage":{"control":"text"},"disabled":{"control":"boolean"},"showIcon":{"control":"boolean"},"required":{"control":"boolean"},"showRequiredAsterisk":{"control":"boolean"},"name":{"control":"text"},"form":{"control":"text"},"ariaDescribedBy":{"control":"text"},"size":{"control":"number"},"multiple":{"control":"boolean"},"showEmptyOption":{"control":"boolean"},"autocomplete":{"control":"text"},"messageIcon":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"},"onClick":{"action":"onClick"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBSelect>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const DefaultEmpty: Story = {
	args: {
	"label": "Label",
"variant": "floating",
"placeholder": "(Default) Empty",
"options": [{
  value: 'Option 1'
}, {
  value: 'Option 2'
}, {
  value: 'Option 3'
}, {
  value: 'Option 4'
}, {
  value: 'Option 5'
}]
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBSelect  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const Filled: Story = {
	args: {
	"label": "Label",
"value": "Filled",
"variant": "floating",
"placeholder": "Filled",
"options": [{
  value: 'Filled',
  selected: true
}, {
  value: 'Option 2'
}]
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBSelect  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const Disabled: Story = {
	args: {
	"label": "Label",
"variant": "floating",
"value": "Disabled",
"placeholder": "Disabled",
"options": [{
  value: 'Disabled',
  selected: true
}, {
  value: 'Option 2'
}],
"disabled": true
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBSelect  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const Invalid: Story = {
	args: {
	"label": "Label",
"placeholder": "Invalid",
"variant": "floating",
"validation": "invalid",
"invalidMessage": "Invalid Message",
"options": [{
  value: 'Option 1'
}, {
  value: 'Option 2'
}, {
  value: 'Option 3'
}, {
  value: 'Option 4'
}, {
  value: 'Option 5'
}]
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBSelect  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};

import { DBSelect, type DBSelectProps } from '@components';

	title: 'Components/DBSelect/Option Groups',

	args: {

	argTypes: {"options":{"control":"object"},"label":{"control":"text"},"placeholder":{"control":"text"},"variant":{"control":"select","options":["above","floating"]},"value":{"control":"text"},"showLabel":{"control":"boolean"},"message":{"control":"text"},"showMessage":{"control":"boolean"},"validation":{"control":"select","options":["invalid","valid","no-validation"]},"invalidMessage":{"control":"text"},"validMessage":{"control":"text"},"disabled":{"control":"boolean"},"showIcon":{"control":"boolean"},"required":{"control":"boolean"},"showRequiredAsterisk":{"control":"boolean"},"name":{"control":"text"},"form":{"control":"text"},"ariaDescribedBy":{"control":"text"},"size":{"control":"number"},"multiple":{"control":"boolean"},"showEmptyOption":{"control":"boolean"},"autocomplete":{"control":"text"},"messageIcon":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"},"onClick":{"action":"onClick"}}

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const Usingoptgroups: Story = {
	args: {
	"label": "Label",
"placeholder": "Using optgroups",
"options": [{
  label: 'Group 1',
  value: '',
  options: [{
    value: 'Option 1'
  }, {
    value: 'Option 2'
  }]
}, {
  label: 'Group 2',
  value: '',
  options: [{
    value: 'Option 3'
  }, {
    value: 'Option 4'
  }]
}]
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBSelect  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const Mixedoptionsandgroups: Story = {
	args: {
	"label": "Label",
"placeholder": "Mixed options and groups",
"options": [{
  value: 'Single Option'
}, {
  label: 'Grouped Options',
  value: '',
  options: [{
    value: 'Group Option 1'
  }, {
    value: 'Group Option 2'
  }]
}, {
  value: 'Another Single Option'
}]
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBSelect  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBInfotext,DBStack, type DBStackProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBStack> = {
	title: 'Components/DBStack/Alignment Column',
	component: DBStack,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"variant":{"control":"select","options":["simple","divider"]},"gap":{"control":"select","options":["none","3x-large","2x-large","x-large","large","medium","small","x-small","2x-small","3x-small"]},"direction":{"control":"select","options":["row","column"]},"wrap":{"control":"boolean"},"alignment":{"control":"select","options":["stretch","start","end","center"]},"justifyContent":{"control":"select","options":["space-between","start","end","center"]},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBStack>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const DefaultStretch: Story = {
	args: {
	"alignment": "stretch",
"style": {
  padding: 'var(--db-spacing-fixed-xs)',
  border: 'var(--db-border-width-3xs) dashed var(--db-adaptive-on-bg-basic-emphasis-60-default)'
},
"children":<><span className="dummy-component"><a  href="#">Content 1</a></span><span className="dummy-component">Content 2</span><span className="dummy-component">Content 3</span></>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  alignItems: 'flex-start',
  alignSelf: 'flex-start',
  display: 'flex',
  flexWrap: 'nowrap',
  flexDirection: 'column',
  gap: 'var(--db-spacing-fixed-sm)',
  width: '200px'
}}><DBInfotext  size="small"  icon="none"  semantic="informational">
					(Default) Stretch
				</DBInfotext><DBStack  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};

};

import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBStack> = {
	title: 'Components/DBStack/Justify Content Column',
	component: DBStack,

const meta: Meta<typeof DBStack> = {

	),
};

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBTabList,DBTabItem, type DBTabItemProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBTabItem> = {
	title: 'Components/DBTabItem/Show Icon Trailing',
	component: DBTabItem,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"label":{"control":"text"},"active":{"control":"boolean"},"disabled":{"control":"boolean"},"showIcon":{"control":"boolean"},"showIconLeading":{"control":"boolean"},"showIconTrailing":{"control":"boolean"},"noText":{"control":"boolean"},"checked":{"control":"boolean"},"name":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBTabItem>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const DefaultFalse: Story = {
	args: {
	"label": "(Default) False",
"icon": "x_placeholder",
"iconTrailing": "x_placeholder",
"showIcon": false,
"showIconTrailing": false
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBTabList><DBTabItem  {...properties}  /></DBTabList>
	),
};
export const True: Story = {
	args: {
	"label": "True",
"icon": "x_placeholder",
"iconTrailing": "x_placeholder",
"showIcon": true,
"showIconTrailing": true
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBTabList><DBTabItem  {...properties}  /></DBTabList>
	),
};

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBInfotext,DBTabItem,DBTabList,DBTabPanel,DBTabs, type DBTabsProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBTabs> = {
	title: 'Components/DBTabs/Density',
	component: DBTabs,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"orientation":{"control":"select","options":["horizontal","vertical"]},"width":{"control":"select","options":["full","auto"]},"alignment":{"control":"select","options":["start","center"]},"behavior":{"control":"select","options":["scrollbar","arrows"]},"initialSelectedIndex":{"control":"number"},"initialSelectedMode":{"control":"select","options":["auto","manually"]},"name":{"control":"text"},"tabs":{"control":"object"},"arrowScrollDistance":{"control":"number"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBTabs>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const Functional: Story = {
	args: {
	"data-density": "functional",
"children":<><DBTabList><DBTabItem>Test 1</DBTabItem><DBTabItem>Test 2</DBTabItem><DBTabItem>Test 3</DBTabItem></DBTabList><DBTabPanel>Tab Panel 1</DBTabPanel><DBTabPanel>Tab Panel 2</DBTabPanel><DBTabPanel>Tab Panel 3</DBTabPanel></>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div className="fit-content-container"><DBInfotext  icon="none"  size="small"  semantic="informational">
					Functional:
				</DBInfotext><DBTabs  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const DefaultRegular: Story = {
	args: {
	"data-density": "regular",
"children":<><DBTabList><DBTabItem>Test 1</DBTabItem><DBTabItem>Test 2</DBTabItem><DBTabItem>Test 3</DBTabItem></DBTabList><DBTabPanel>Tab Panel 1</DBTabPanel><DBTabPanel>Tab Panel 2</DBTabPanel><DBTabPanel>Tab Panel 3</DBTabPanel></>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div className="fit-content-container"><DBInfotext  icon="none"  size="small"  semantic="informational">
					(Default) Regular:
				</DBInfotext><DBTabs  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const Expressive: Story = {
	args: {
	"data-density": "expressive",
"children":<><DBTabList><DBTabItem>Test 1</DBTabItem><DBTabItem>Test 2</DBTabItem><DBTabItem>Test 3</DBTabItem></DBTabList><DBTabPanel>Tab Panel 1</DBTabPanel><DBTabPanel>Tab Panel 2</DBTabPanel><DBTabPanel>Tab Panel 3</DBTabPanel></>

	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div className="fit-content-container"><DBInfotext  icon="none"  size="small"  semantic="informational">

	),
};

}}><DBInfotext  icon="none"  size="small"  semantic="informational">
                full - alignment: center:
            </DBInfotext><DBTabs  {...properties}  /></div>
);

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBTag, type DBTagProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBTag> = {
	title: 'Components/DBTag/Behavior',
	component: DBTag,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	args: {
	"onRemove": fn()
	},
	argTypes: {"emphasis":{"control":"select","options":["weak","strong"]},"semantic":{"control":"select","options":["adaptive","neutral","critical","informational","warning","successful"]},"behavior":{"control":"select","options":["static","removable"]},"showIcon":{"control":"boolean"},"noText":{"control":"boolean"},"content":{"control":"text"},"showCheckState":{"control":"boolean"},"overflow":{"control":"boolean"},"removeButton":{"control":"text"},"text":{"control":"text"},"value":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"},"onRemove":{"action":"onRemove"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBTag>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const DefaultStatic: Story = {
	args: {
	"children":"(Default) Static"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBTag  {...properties}  />
	),
};
export const Removable: Story = {
	args: {
	"behavior": "removable",
"children":"Removable"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBTag  {...properties}  />
	),
};
export const InteractiveButton: Story = {
	args: {
	"children":<button>Interactive (Button)</button>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBTag  {...properties}  />
	),
};
export const InteractiveLink: Story = {
	args: {
	"children":<a  href="#">Interactive (Link)</a>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBTag  {...properties}  />
	),
};
export const InteractiveCheckbox: Story = {
	args: {
	"children":<label><input  type="checkbox"  />
					Interactive (Checkbox)
				</label>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBTag  {...properties}  />
	),
};
export const InteractiveRadio: Story = {
	args: {
	"children":<label><input  type="radio"  name="radio01"  />
					Interactive (Radio)
				</label>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBTag  {...properties}  />
	),
};
export const InteractiveRadio2: Story = {
	args: {
	"children":<label><input  type="radio"  name="radio01"  />
					Interactive Radio 2
				</label>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBTag  {...properties}  />
	),
};

const meta: Meta<typeof DBAccordion> = {
	title: 'Components/DBAccordion/Behavior',

	args: {
	"behavior": "multiple",
"children":<><DBAccordionItem  headlinePlain="Item 1">

						Content 2
					</DBAccordionItem><DBAccordionItem  headlinePlain="Item 3">

		<div><DBInfotext  size="small"  semantic="informational"  icon="none">

	),
};

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBAccordionItem,DBInfotext,DBAccordion, type DBAccordionProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBAccordion> = {
	title: 'Components/DBAccordion/Density',
	component: DBAccordion,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"behavior":{"control":"select","options":["multiple","single"]},"variant":{"control":"select","options":["divider","card"]},"initOpenIndex":{"control":"object"},"items":{"control":"object"},"name":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBAccordion>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const Functional: Story = {
	args: {
	"children":<><DBAccordionItem  headlinePlain="Item 1">
						Content 1
					</DBAccordionItem><DBAccordionItem  headlinePlain="Item 2">
						Content 2
					</DBAccordionItem><DBAccordionItem  headlinePlain="Item 3">
						Content 3
					</DBAccordionItem></>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  data-density="functional"><DBInfotext  size="small"  semantic="informational"  icon="none">
					Functional
				</DBInfotext><DBAccordion  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const Regular: Story = {
	args: {
	"children":<><DBAccordionItem  headlinePlain="Item 1">
						Content 1
					</DBAccordionItem><DBAccordionItem  headlinePlain="Item 2">
						Content 2
					</DBAccordionItem><DBAccordionItem  headlinePlain="Item 3">
						Content 3
					</DBAccordionItem></>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  data-density="regular"><DBInfotext  size="small"  semantic="informational"  icon="none">
					(Default) Regular
				</DBInfotext><DBAccordion  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const Expressive: Story = {
	args: {
	"children":<><DBAccordionItem  headlinePlain="Item 1">
						Content 1
					</DBAccordionItem><DBAccordionItem  headlinePlain="Item 2">
						Content 2
					</DBAccordionItem><DBAccordionItem  headlinePlain="Item 3">
						Content 3
					</DBAccordionItem></>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  data-density="expressive"><DBInfotext  size="small"  semantic="informational"  icon="none">
					Expressive
				</DBInfotext><DBAccordion  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBAccordionItem, type DBAccordionItemProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBAccordionItem> = {
	title: 'Components/DBAccordionItem/Density',
	component: DBAccordionItem,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"headlinePlain":{"control":"text"},"disabled":{"control":"boolean"},"defaultOpen":{"control":"boolean"},"text":{"control":"text"},"name":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBAccordionItem>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const Functional: Story = {
	args: {
	"data-density": "functional",
"headlinePlain": "Functional",
"children":"Functional"

	),
};

	),
};

	args: {
	"data-density": "expressive",
"headlinePlain": "Expressive",
"children":"Expressive"
	},

		<div><DBAccordionItem  {...properties}  /></div>

./src/components/badge/examples/placement.example.stories.tsx:
import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBButton,DBIcon,DBInfotext,DBBadge, type DBBadgeProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBBadge> = {
	title: 'Components/DBBadge/Placement',
	component: DBBadge,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"emphasis":{"control":"select","options":["weak","strong"]},"semantic":{"control":"select","options":["adaptive","neutral","critical","informational","warning","successful"]},"size":{"control":"select","options":["small","medium"]},"placement":{"control":"select","options":["inline","corner-top-left","corner-top-right","corner-center-left","corner-center-right","corner-bottom-left","corner-bottom-right"]},"label":{"control":"text"},"text":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBBadge>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const DefaultInline: Story = {
	args: {
	"size": "small",
"emphasis": "strong",
"semantic": "critical",
"children":"Label"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div className="badge-inline-container"><span  data-icon="x_placeholder">(Default) Inline</span><DBBadge  {...properties}  /><DBIcon  icon="error"  /></div>
	),
};
export const CornerTopLeft: Story = {
	args: {
	"size": "small",
"emphasis": "strong",
"semantic": "critical",
"placement": "corner-top-left"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div><DBButton  data-sb-decorator="true"  icon="x_placeholder"  variant="outlined"  noText><DBBadge  {...properties}  />
					Corner - Top - Left
				</DBButton><DBInfotext  size="small"  semantic="informational"  icon="none">
					Corner - Top - Left
				</DBInfotext></div>
	),
};
export const CornerCenterLeft: Story = {
	args: {
	"size": "small",
"emphasis": "strong",
"semantic": "critical",
"placement": "corner-center-left"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div><DBButton  data-sb-decorator="true"  icon="x_placeholder"  variant="outlined"  noText><DBBadge  {...properties}  />
					Corner - Center - Left
				</DBButton><DBInfotext  size="small"  semantic="informational"  icon="none">
					Corner - Center - Left
				</DBInfotext></div>
	),
};
export const CornerBottomLeft: Story = {
	args: {
	"size": "small",
"emphasis": "strong",
"semantic": "critical",
"placement": "corner-bottom-left"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div><DBButton  data-sb-decorator="true"  icon="x_placeholder"  variant="outlined"  noText><DBBadge  {...properties}  />
					Corner - Bottom- Left
				</DBButton><DBInfotext  size="small"  semantic="informational"  icon="none">
					Corner - Bottom- Left
				</DBInfotext></div>
	),
};
export const CornerTopRight: Story = {
	args: {
	"size": "small",
"emphasis": "strong",
"semantic": "critical",
"placement": "corner-top-right"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div><DBButton  data-sb-decorator="true"  icon="x_placeholder"  variant="outlined"  noText><DBBadge  {...properties}  />
					Corner - Top - Right
				</DBButton><DBInfotext  size="small"  semantic="informational"  icon="none">

};

	args: {
	"size": "small",
"emphasis": "strong",

	},
	render: (properties: any) => (

					Corner - Center - Right

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBBadge, type DBBadgeProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBBadge> = {
	title: 'Components/DBBadge/Semantic',
	component: DBBadge,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"emphasis":{"control":"select","options":["weak","strong"]},"semantic":{"control":"select","options":["adaptive","neutral","critical","informational","warning","successful"]},"size":{"control":"select","options":["small","medium"]},"placement":{"control":"select","options":["inline","corner-top-left","corner-top-right","corner-center-left","corner-center-right","corner-bottom-left","corner-bottom-right"]},"label":{"control":"text"},"text":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}

	title: 'Components/DBBrand/Density',

	parameters: {

	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"hideLogo":{"control":"boolean"},"showIcon":{"control":"boolean"},"text":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBBrand, type DBBrandProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBBrand> = {
	title: 'Components/DBBrand/Variants',
	component: DBBrand,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"hideLogo":{"control":"boolean"},"showIcon":{"control":"boolean"},"text":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBBrand>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const DefaultWithLogo: Story = {
	args: {
	"children":"(Default) With Logo"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBBrand  {...properties}  />
	),
};
export const NoLogo: Story = {
	args: {
	"hideLogo": true,
"children":"No Logo"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBBrand  {...properties}  />
	),
};
export const CustomLogo: Story = {
	args: {
	"hideLogo": true,
"children":<><img  alt="this is a fancy placeholder logo"  src={getImage()}  />Custom Logo</>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBBrand  {...properties}  />
	),
};

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBButton, type DBButtonProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBButton> = {
	title: 'Components/DBButton/Multi Line Text',
	component: DBButton,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	args: {
	"onClick": fn()
	},
	argTypes: {"variant":{"control":"select","options":["outlined","brand","ghost","filled"]},"disabled":{"control":"boolean"},"form":{"control":"text"},"name":{"control":"text"},"noText":{"control":"boolean"},"wrap":{"control":"boolean"},"type":{"control":"select","options":["button","reset","submit"]},"value":{"control":"text"},"showIcon":{"control":"boolean"},"showIconLeading":{"control":"boolean"},"showIconTrailing":{"control":"boolean"},"width":{"control":"select","options":["full","auto"]},"size":{"control":"select","options":["small","medium"]},"text":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"},"onClick":{"action":"onClick"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBButton>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const AutomaticLineBreaks: Story = {
	args: {
	"width": "full",
"onClick": fn(),
"children":"Multi-line Text With Automatic Line Breaks"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBButton  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const AutomaticLineBreaksandIcon: Story = {
	args: {
	"width": "full",
"icon": "x_placeholder",
"onClick": fn(),
"children":"Multi-line Text With Automatic Line Breaks and Icon"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBButton  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const SmallAutomaticLineBreaks: Story = {
	args: {
	"size": "small",
"onClick": fn(),
"children":"Button Small Multi-line Text With Automatic Line Breaks"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBButton  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};

import { DBCheckbox, type DBCheckboxProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBCheckbox> = {
	title: 'Components/DBCheckbox/Validation',
	component: DBCheckbox,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"name":{"control":"text"},"disabled":{"control":"boolean"},"checked":{"control":"boolean"},"indeterminate":{"control":"boolean"},"validation":{"control":"select","options":["invalid","valid","no-validation"]},"invalidMessage":{"control":"text"},"validMessage":{"control":"text"},"message":{"control":"text"},"showMessage":{"control":"boolean"},"size":{"control":"select","options":["small","medium"]},"required":{"control":"boolean"},"showLabel":{"control":"boolean"},"showRequiredAsterisk":{"control":"boolean"},"label":{"control":"text"},"placeholder":{"control":"text"},"variant":{"control":"select","options":["above","floating"]},"value":{"control":"text"},"form":{"control":"text"},"ariaDescribedBy":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBCheckbox>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const DefaultNovalidation: Story = {
	args: {
	"name": "Validation",
"validation": "no-validation",
"children":"(Default) No validation"
	},

	),
};
export const Invalid: Story = {
	args: {
	"name": "Validation",
"validation": "invalid",

	),
};
export const Valid: Story = {
	args: {
	"name": "Validation",
"validation": "valid",
"validMessage": "Valid message",
"children":"Valid"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBCheckbox  {...properties}  />
	),
};

import { DBInfotext,DBCustomButton, type DBCustomButtonProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBCustomButton> = {
	title: 'Components/DBCustomButton/Density',
	component: DBCustomButton,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"variant":{"control":"select","options":["outlined","brand","ghost","filled"]},"noText":{"control":"boolean"},"wrap":{"control":"boolean"},"showIcon":{"control":"boolean"},"showIconLeading":{"control":"boolean"},"showIconTrailing":{"control":"boolean"},"width":{"control":"select","options":["full","auto"]},"size":{"control":"select","options":["small","medium"]},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBCustomButton>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const FunctionalButton: Story = {
	args: {
	"data-density": "functional",
"children":<button  type="button">Button</button>
	},

	),
};

	),
};

	),
};

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBInfotext,DBCustomButton, type DBCustomButtonProps } from '@components';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBCustomButton> = {
	title: 'Components/DBCustomButton/Multi Line Text',
	component: DBCustomButton,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"variant":{"control":"select","options":["outlined","brand","ghost","filled"]},"noText":{"control":"boolean"},"wrap":{"control":"boolean"},"showIcon":{"control":"boolean"},"showIconLeading":{"control":"boolean"},"showIconTrailing":{"control":"boolean"},"width":{"control":"select","options":["full","auto"]},"size":{"control":"select","options":["small","medium"]},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBCustomButton>;

  width: '300px'
}}><DBCustomButton  {...properties}  /></div>

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBInfotext,DBCustomButton, type DBCustomButtonProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBCustomButton> = {
	title: 'Components/DBCustomButton/No Text',
	component: DBCustomButton,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"variant":{"control":"select","options":["outlined","brand","ghost","filled"]},"noText":{"control":"boolean"},"wrap":{"control":"boolean"},"showIcon":{"control":"boolean"},"showIconLeading":{"control":"boolean"},"showIconTrailing":{"control":"boolean"},"width":{"control":"select","options":["full","auto"]},"size":{"control":"select","options":["small","medium"]},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBCustomButton>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const DefaultFalseButton: Story = {
	args: {
	"icon": "x_placeholder",
"children":<button  type="button">Button</button>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBCustomButton  {...properties}  />
	),
};
export const DefaultFalseCheckbox: Story = {
	args: {
	"icon": "x_placeholder",
"children":<label  htmlFor="checkbox11"><input  type="checkbox"  id="checkbox11"  />
					Checkbox
				</label>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBCustomButton  {...properties}  />
	),
};
export const DefaultFalseLink: Story = {
	args: {
	"icon": "x_placeholder",
"children":<a  href="#">Link</a>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBCustomButton  {...properties}  />
	),
};
export const TrueButton: Story = {
	args: {
	"icon": "x_placeholder",
"noText": true,
"children":<button  type="button">Button</button>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBCustomButton  {...properties}  />
	),
};
export const TrueCheckbox: Story = {
	args: {
	"icon": "x_placeholder",
"noText": true,
"children":<label  htmlFor="checkbox12"><input  type="checkbox"  id="checkbox12"  />
					Checkbox
				</label>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBCustomButton  {...properties}  />
	),
};
export const TrueLink: Story = {
	args: {
	"icon": "x_placeholder",
"noText": true,
"children":<a  href="#">Link</a>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBCustomButton  {...properties}  />
	),
};

const meta: Meta<typeof DBCustomButton> = {
	title: 'Components/DBCustomButton/Show Icon Leading',
	component: DBCustomButton,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'

	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"variant":{"control":"select","options":["outlined","brand","ghost","filled"]},"noText":{"control":"boolean"},"wrap":{"control":"boolean"},"showIcon":{"control":"boolean"},"showIconLeading":{"control":"boolean"},"showIconTrailing":{"control":"boolean"},"width":{"control":"select","options":["full","auto"]},"size":{"control":"select","options":["small","medium"]},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBBrand,DBButton,DBLink,DBNavigationItem,DBNavigation,DBHeader, type DBHeaderProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBHeader> = {
	title: 'Components/DBHeader/Behavior',
	component: DBHeader,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"width":{"control":"select","options":["full","medium","large","small"]},"forceMobile":{"control":"boolean"},"drawerOpen":{"control":"boolean"},"burgerMenuLabel":{"control":"text"},"closeButtonId":{"control":"text"},"closeButtonText":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBHeader>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const Desktopfullwidth: Story = {
	args: {
	"brand": <DBBrand>DBHeader</DBBrand>,
"metaNavigation": <>
							<DBLink href="#">Imprint</DBLink>
							<DBLink href="#">Help</DBLink>
						</>,
"primaryAction": <DBButton icon="magnifying_glass" variant="ghost" noText>
							Search
						</DBButton>,
"secondaryAction": <>
							<DBButton icon="x_placeholder" variant="ghost" noText>
								Profile
							</DBButton>
							<DBButton icon="x_placeholder" variant="ghost" noText>
								Notification
							</DBButton>
							<DBButton icon="x_placeholder" variant="ghost" noText>
								Help
							</DBButton>
						</>,
"children":<DBNavigation  aria-label="Desktop (full width)"  {...({})}><DBNavigationItem  icon="x_placeholder"><a  href="#">Desktop (full width)</a></DBNavigationItem><DBNavigationItem  disabled><a  href="#">Desktop (full width) disabled</a></DBNavigationItem></DBNavigation>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '100%',
  display: 'block'
}}><DBHeader  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const Mobile: Story = {
	args: {
	"forceMobile": "true",
"brand": <DBBrand>DBHeader</DBBrand>,
"metaNavigation": <>
							<DBLink href="#">Imprint</DBLink>
							<DBLink href="#">Help</DBLink>
						</>,
"primaryAction": <DBButton icon="magnifying_glass" variant="ghost" noText>
							Search
						</DBButton>,
"secondaryAction": <>
							<DBButton icon="x_placeholder" variant="ghost" noText>
								Profile
							</DBButton>
							<DBButton icon="x_placeholder" variant="ghost" noText>
								Notification
							</DBButton>
							<DBButton icon="x_placeholder" variant="ghost" noText>
								Help
							</DBButton>
						</>,
"children":<DBNavigation  aria-label="Mobile"  {...({})}><DBNavigationItem  icon="x_placeholder"><a  href="#">Mobile</a></DBNavigationItem><DBNavigationItem  disabled><a  href="#">Mobile disabled</a></DBNavigationItem></DBNavigation>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '100%',
  display: 'block'
}}><DBHeader  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
