import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBBrand,DBButton,DBLink,DBNavigationItem,DBNavigation,DBHeader, type DBHeaderProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBHeader> = {
	title: 'Components/DBHeader/Width',
	component: DBHeader,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"width":{"control":"select","options":["full","medium","large","small"]},"forceMobile":{"control":"boolean"},"drawerOpen":{"control":"boolean"},"burgerMenuLabel":{"control":"text"},"closeButtonId":{"control":"text"},"closeButtonText":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBHeader>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const Full: Story = {
	args: {
	"brand": <DBBrand>DBHeader</DBBrand>,
"metaNavigation": <>
							<DBLink href="#">Imprint</DBLink>
							<DBLink href="#">Help</DBLink>
						</>,
"primaryAction": <DBButton icon="magnifying_glass" variant="ghost" noText>
							Search
						</DBButton>,
"secondaryAction": <>
							<DBButton icon="x_placeholder" variant="ghost" noText>
								Profile
							</DBButton>
							<DBButton icon="x_placeholder" variant="ghost" noText>
								Notification
							</DBButton>
							<DBButton icon="x_placeholder" variant="ghost" noText>
								Help
							</DBButton>
						</>,
"children":<DBNavigation  aria-label="Full"  {...({})}><DBNavigationItem  icon="x_placeholder"><a  href="#">Full</a></DBNavigationItem><DBNavigationItem  disabled><a  href="#">Full disabled</a></DBNavigationItem></DBNavigation>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '100%',
  display: 'block'
}}><DBHeader  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};

"brand": <DBBrand>DBHeader</DBBrand>,

							<DBButton icon="x_placeholder" variant="ghost" noText>

"children":<DBNavigation  aria-label="Medium"  {...({})}><DBNavigationItem  icon="x_placeholder"><a  href="#">Medium</a></DBNavigationItem><DBNavigationItem  disabled><a  href="#">Medium disabled</a></DBNavigationItem></DBNavigation>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBInfotext,DBIcon, type DBIconProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBIcon> = {
	title: 'Components/DBIcon/Density',
	component: DBIcon,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"icon":{"control":"select","options":["arrow_down","arrow_left","arrow_right","arrow_up","arrow_up_right","brand","calendar","check-circle","check","check_circle","chevron_down","chevron_left","chevron_right","chevron_up","circle","circular_arrows","clock","cross","cross_circle","exclamation_mark_circle","exclamation_mark_triangle","information_circle","magnifying_glass","menu","minus","plus","resize_handle_corner","x_placeholder"]},"variant":{"control":"text"},"weight":{"control":"select","options":["16","20","24","32","48","64"]},"text":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBIcon>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const Functional: Story = {
	args: {
	"icon": "x_placeholder",
"children":"Functional"
	},

};

import { DBInput, type DBInputProps } from '@components';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBInput> = {

	component: DBInput,

	},

"label": "Label",

	),
};

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBInfotext,DBNavigationItem,DBNavigation, type DBNavigationProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBNavigation> = {
	title: 'Components/DBNavigation/Density',
	component: DBNavigation,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBNavigation>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const Functional: Story = {
	args: {
	"aria-labelledby": "functional",
"children":<><DBNavigationItem  subNavigation={<><DBNavigationItem  subNavigation={<><DBNavigationItem><a  href="#"  aria-current="page">
													Sub-Sub-Navi-Item 1
												</a></DBNavigationItem>
<DBNavigationItem><a  href="#">
													Sub-Sub-Navi-Item 2
												</a></DBNavigationItem></>}>
									Sub-Navi-Item 1
								</DBNavigationItem>
<DBNavigationItem><a  href="#">Sub-Navi-Item 2</a></DBNavigationItem></>}>
						Navi-Item 1
					</DBNavigationItem><DBNavigationItem  icon="x_placeholder"><a  href="#">Navi-Item 2</a></DBNavigationItem><DBNavigationItem  disabled><a  href="#">Navi-Item 3</a></DBNavigationItem></>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div className="fit-content-container"  data-density="functional"><DBInfotext  id="functional"  size="small"  semantic="informational"  icon="none">
					Functional
				</DBInfotext><DBNavigation  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const DefaultRegular: Story = {
	args: {
	"aria-labelledby": "_default__regular",
"children":<><DBNavigationItem  subNavigation={<><DBNavigationItem  subNavigation={<><DBNavigationItem><a  href="#"  aria-current="page">
													Sub-Sub-Navi-Item 1
												</a></DBNavigationItem>
<DBNavigationItem><a  href="#">
													Sub-Sub-Navi-Item 2
												</a></DBNavigationItem></>}>
									Sub-Navi-Item 1
								</DBNavigationItem>
<DBNavigationItem><a  href="#">Sub-Navi-Item 2</a></DBNavigationItem></>}>
						Navi-Item 1
					</DBNavigationItem><DBNavigationItem  icon="x_placeholder"><a  href="#">Navi-Item 2</a></DBNavigationItem><DBNavigationItem  disabled><a  href="#">Navi-Item 3</a></DBNavigationItem></>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div className="fit-content-container"  data-density="regular"><DBInfotext  id="_default__regular"  size="small"  semantic="informational"  icon="none">
					(Default) Regular
				</DBInfotext><DBNavigation  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const Expressive: Story = {
	args: {
	"aria-labelledby": "expressive",
"children":<><DBNavigationItem  subNavigation={<><DBNavigationItem  subNavigation={<><DBNavigationItem><a  href="#"  aria-current="page">
													Sub-Sub-Navi-Item 1
												</a></DBNavigationItem>
<DBNavigationItem><a  href="#">
													Sub-Sub-Navi-Item 2
												</a></DBNavigationItem></>}>
									Sub-Navi-Item 1
								</DBNavigationItem>
<DBNavigationItem><a  href="#">Sub-Navi-Item 2</a></DBNavigationItem></>}>
						Navi-Item 1
					</DBNavigationItem><DBNavigationItem  icon="x_placeholder"><a  href="#">Navi-Item 2</a></DBNavigationItem><DBNavigationItem  disabled><a  href="#">Navi-Item 3</a></DBNavigationItem></>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div className="fit-content-container"  data-density="expressive"><DBInfotext  id="expressive"  size="small"  semantic="informational"  icon="none">
					Expressive
				</DBInfotext><DBNavigation  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBNavigationItem, type DBNavigationItemProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBNavigationItem> = {
	title: 'Components/DBNavigationItem/Width',
	component: DBNavigationItem,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	args: {
	"onClick": fn()
	},
	argTypes: {"disabled":{"control":"boolean"},"active":{"control":"boolean"},"showIcon":{"control":"boolean"},"width":{"control":"select","options":["full","auto"]},"wrap":{"control":"boolean"},"text":{"control":"text"},"subNavigationExpanded":{"control":"boolean"},"backButtonId":{"control":"text"},"backButtonText":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"},"onClick":{"action":"onClick"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBNavigationItem>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const DefaultAuto: Story = {
	args: {
	"children":<a  href="#">(Default) Auto</a>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<ul  style={{
  width: '400px'
}}><DBNavigationItem  {...properties}  /></ul>
	),
};
export const Full: Story = {
	args: {
	"width": "full",
"children":<a  href="#">Full</a>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<ul  style={{
  width: '400px'
}}><DBNavigationItem  {...properties}  /></ul>
	),
};

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBNavigationItem, type DBNavigationItemProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBNavigationItem> = {
	title: 'Components/DBNavigationItem/Wrap',
	component: DBNavigationItem,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	args: {
	"onClick": fn()
	},
	argTypes: {"disabled":{"control":"boolean"},"active":{"control":"boolean"},"showIcon":{"control":"boolean"},"width":{"control":"select","options":["full","auto"]},"wrap":{"control":"boolean"},"text":{"control":"text"},"subNavigationExpanded":{"control":"boolean"},"backButtonId":{"control":"text"},"backButtonText":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"},"onClick":{"action":"onClick"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBNavigationItem>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const DefaultFalse: Story = {
	args: {
	"children":<a  href="#">No Wrap (Default)</a>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<ul><DBNavigationItem  {...properties}  /></ul>
	),
};
export const True: Story = {
	args: {
	"icon": "x_placeholder",
"subNavigation": <>
							<DBNavigationItem subNavigation={<>
										<DBNavigationItem>
											<a href="#">Sub-Sub-Navi-Item 1</a>
										</DBNavigationItem>
										<DBNavigationItem>
											<a href="#">Sub-Sub-Navi-Item 2</a>
										</DBNavigationItem>
									</>}>
								Sub-Navi-Item 1
							</DBNavigationItem>
							<DBNavigationItem>
								<a href="#">Sub-Navi-Item 2</a>
							</DBNavigationItem>
						</>,
"showIcon": true,
"wrap": true,
"children":"This is a very long text that is broken into multiple lines."
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<ul  style={{
  width: '200px'
}}><DBNavigationItem  {...properties}  /></ul>
	),
};

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBNotification, type DBNotificationProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBNotification> = {
	title: 'Components/DBNotification/Closeable',
	component: DBNotification,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	args: {
	"onClose": fn()
	},
	argTypes: {"headline":{"control":"text"},"showIcon":{"control":"boolean"},"variant":{"control":"select","options":["docked","standalone","overlay"]},"semantic":{"control":"select","options":["adaptive","neutral","critical","informational","warning","successful"]},"closeable":{"control":"boolean"},"linkVariant":{"control":"select","options":["block","inline"]},"showHeadline":{"control":"boolean"},"showTimestamp":{"control":"boolean"},"timestamp":{"control":"text"},"ariaLive":{"control":"select","options":["assertive","polite","off"]},"text":{"control":"text"},"role":{"control":"text"},"closeButtonId":{"control":"text"},"closeButtonText":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"},"onClose":{"action":"onClose"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBNotification>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const DefaultFalse: Story = {
	args: {
	"closeable": false,
"children":"(Default) False"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBNotification  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const True: Story = {
	args: {
	"closeable": true,
"children":"True"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBNotification  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBNotification, type DBNotificationProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBNotification> = {
	title: 'Components/DBNotification/Density',
	component: DBNotification,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	args: {
	"onClose": fn()
	},
	argTypes: {"headline":{"control":"text"},"showIcon":{"control":"boolean"},"variant":{"control":"select","options":["docked","standalone","overlay"]},"semantic":{"control":"select","options":["adaptive","neutral","critical","informational","warning","successful"]},"closeable":{"control":"boolean"},"linkVariant":{"control":"select","options":["block","inline"]},"showHeadline":{"control":"boolean"},"showTimestamp":{"control":"boolean"},"timestamp":{"control":"text"},"ariaLive":{"control":"select","options":["assertive","polite","off"]},"text":{"control":"text"},"role":{"control":"text"},"closeButtonId":{"control":"text"},"closeButtonText":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"},"onClose":{"action":"onClose"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBNotification>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const functional: Story = {
	args: {
	"data-density": "functional",
"headline": "Headline",
"icon": "information_circle",
"children":"functional"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBNotification  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const regularDefault: Story = {
	args: {
	"data-density": "regular",
"headline": "Headline",
"icon": "information_circle",
"children":"regular (Default)"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBNotification  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const expressive: Story = {
	args: {
	"data-density": "expressive",
"headline": "Headline",
"icon": "information_circle",
"children":"expressive"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (

  width: '300px'
}}><DBNotification  {...properties}  /></div>

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBLink,DBNotification, type DBNotificationProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBNotification> = {
	title: 'Components/DBNotification/Examples - Variant:Docked',
	component: DBNotification,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	args: {
	"onClose": fn()
	},
	argTypes: {"headline":{"control":"text"},"showIcon":{"control":"boolean"},"variant":{"control":"select","options":["docked","standalone","overlay"]},"semantic":{"control":"select","options":["adaptive","neutral","critical","informational","warning","successful"]},"closeable":{"control":"boolean"},"linkVariant":{"control":"select","options":["block","inline"]},"showHeadline":{"control":"boolean"},"showTimestamp":{"control":"boolean"},"timestamp":{"control":"text"},"ariaLive":{"control":"select","options":["assertive","polite","off"]},"text":{"control":"text"},"role":{"control":"text"},"closeButtonId":{"control":"text"},"closeButtonText":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"},"onClose":{"action":"onClose"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBNotification>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const Text: Story = {
	args: {
	"children":"Text"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBNotification  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const TextIcon: Story = {
	args: {
	"icon": "information_circle",
"children":"Text & Icon"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBNotification  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const TextPreviewImage: Story = {
	args: {
	"image": <img src="/assets/images/placeholder.jpg" alt="this is a fancy placeholder" />,
"children":"Text & Preview Image"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBNotification  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const TextHeadline: Story = {
	args: {
	"headline": "Headline",
"children":"Text & Headline"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBNotification  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const TextTextlinkBlock: Story = {
	args: {
	"link": <DBLink href="#">Textlink</DBLink>,
"children":"Text & Textlink Block"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBNotification  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const TextTextlinkInline: Story = {
	args: {
	"linkVariant": "inline",
"link": <DBLink href="#">Textlink</DBLink>,
"children":"Text & Textlink Inline"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBNotification  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};

	"headline": "Headline",
"linkVariant": "inline",

"closeable": true,

	},
	render: (properties: any) => (

  width: '300px'

./src/components/notification/examples/examples-variant-standalone.example.stories.tsx:
import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBLink,DBNotification, type DBNotificationProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBNotification> = {
	title: 'Components/DBNotification/Examples - Variant:Standalone',
	component: DBNotification,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	args: {
	"onClose": fn()
	},
	argTypes: {"headline":{"control":"text"},"showIcon":{"control":"boolean"},"variant":{"control":"select","options":["docked","standalone","overlay"]},"semantic":{"control":"select","options":["adaptive","neutral","critical","informational","warning","successful"]},"closeable":{"control":"boolean"},"linkVariant":{"control":"select","options":["block","inline"]},"showHeadline":{"control":"boolean"},"showTimestamp":{"control":"boolean"},"timestamp":{"control":"text"},"ariaLive":{"control":"select","options":["assertive","polite","off"]},"text":{"control":"text"},"role":{"control":"text"},"closeButtonId":{"control":"text"},"closeButtonText":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"},"onClose":{"action":"onClose"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBNotification>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const Text: Story = {
	args: {
	"variant": "standalone",
"children":"Text"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBNotification  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const TextIcon: Story = {
	args: {
	"icon": "information_circle",
"variant": "standalone",
"children":"Text & Icon"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBNotification  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const TextPreviewImage: Story = {
	args: {
	"variant": "standalone",
"image": <img src="/assets/images/placeholder.jpg" alt="this is a fancy placeholder" />,
"children":"Text & Preview Image"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBNotification  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const TextHeadline: Story = {
	args: {
	"headline": "Headline",
"variant": "standalone",
"children":"Text & Headline"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBNotification  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const TextTextlinkBlock: Story = {
	args: {
	"variant": "standalone",
"link": <DBLink href="#">Textlink</DBLink>,
"children":"Text & Textlink Block"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBNotification  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const TextTextlinkInline: Story = {
	args: {
	"linkVariant": "inline",
"variant": "standalone",
"link": <DBLink href="#">Textlink</DBLink>,
"children":"Text & Textlink Inline"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBNotification  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const TextHeadlineTextlinkInlineCloseable: Story = {
	args: {
	"headline": "Headline",
"linkVariant": "inline",
"variant": "standalone",
"link": <DBLink href="#">Textlink</DBLink>,
"closeable": true,
"children":"Text & Headline & Textlink Inline & Closeable"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBNotification  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const TextIconHeadlineTextlinkInlineCloseable: Story = {
	args: {
	"icon": "information_circle",
"headline": "Headline",
"linkVariant": "inline",
"variant": "standalone",
"link": <DBLink href="#">Textlink</DBLink>,
"closeable": true,
"children":"Text & Icon & Headline & Textlink Inline & Closeable"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBNotification  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};

	title: 'Components/DBNotification/Link Variant',
	component: DBNotification,
	
	parameters: {

	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	args: {
	"onClose": fn()
	},
	argTypes: {"headline":{"control":"text"},"showIcon":{"control":"boolean"},"variant":{"control":"select","options":["docked","standalone","overlay"]},"semantic":{"control":"select","options":["adaptive","neutral","critical","informational","warning","successful"]},"closeable":{"control":"boolean"},"linkVariant":{"control":"select","options":["block","inline"]},"showHeadline":{"control":"boolean"},"showTimestamp":{"control":"boolean"},"timestamp":{"control":"text"},"ariaLive":{"control":"select","options":["assertive","polite","off"]},"text":{"control":"text"},"role":{"control":"text"},"closeButtonId":{"control":"text"},"closeButtonText":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"},"onClose":{"action":"onClose"}}

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBNotification, type DBNotificationProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBNotification> = {
	title: 'Components/DBNotification/Semantic',
	component: DBNotification,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	args: {
	"onClose": fn()
	},
	argTypes: {"headline":{"control":"text"},"showIcon":{"control":"boolean"},"variant":{"control":"select","options":["docked","standalone","overlay"]},"semantic":{"control":"select","options":["adaptive","neutral","critical","informational","warning","successful"]},"closeable":{"control":"boolean"},"linkVariant":{"control":"select","options":["block","inline"]},"showHeadline":{"control":"boolean"},"showTimestamp":{"control":"boolean"},"timestamp":{"control":"text"},"ariaLive":{"control":"select","options":["assertive","polite","off"]},"text":{"control":"text"},"role":{"control":"text"},"closeButtonId":{"control":"text"},"closeButtonText":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"},"onClose":{"action":"onClose"}}

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;

"children":"(Default) Adaptive"

	),

import { DBNotification, type DBNotificationProps } from '@components';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBNotification> = {
	title: 'Components/DBNotification/Show Timestamp',
	component: DBNotification,

	component: DBSection,

	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],

export const Functional: Story = {
	args: {

"data-density": "functional",
"id": "test-id-123",
"style": {
  display: 'grid',
  gap: 'var(--db-spacing-fixed-sm)',
  gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr))'
},
"children":<><DBCard  style={{
  inlineSize: '100%'
}}>Functional</DBCard><DBCard  style={{
  inlineSize: '100%'
}}>Functional</DBCard><DBCard  style={{
  inlineSize: '100%'
}}>Functional</DBCard><DBCard  style={{

}, {

  width: '300px'

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBSelect, type DBSelectProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBSelect> = {
	title: 'Components/DBSelect/Variant',
	component: DBSelect,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	args: {
	"onClick": fn()
	},
	argTypes: {"options":{"control":"object"},"label":{"control":"text"},"placeholder":{"control":"text"},"variant":{"control":"select","options":["above","floating"]},"value":{"control":"text"},"showLabel":{"control":"boolean"},"message":{"control":"text"},"showMessage":{"control":"boolean"},"validation":{"control":"select","options":["invalid","valid","no-validation"]},"invalidMessage":{"control":"text"},"validMessage":{"control":"text"},"disabled":{"control":"boolean"},"showIcon":{"control":"boolean"},"required":{"control":"boolean"},"showRequiredAsterisk":{"control":"boolean"},"name":{"control":"text"},"form":{"control":"text"},"ariaDescribedBy":{"control":"text"},"size":{"control":"number"},"multiple":{"control":"boolean"},"showEmptyOption":{"control":"boolean"},"autocomplete":{"control":"text"},"messageIcon":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"},"onClick":{"action":"onClick"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBSelect>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const DefaultAbove: Story = {
	args: {
	"label": "Label",
"placeholder": "(Default) Above",
"options": [{
  value: 'Option 1'
}, {
  value: 'Option 2'
}, {
  value: 'Option 3'
}, {
  value: 'Option 4'
}, {
  value: 'Option 5'
}]
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBSelect  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const FloatingLabel: Story = {
	args: {
	"label": "Label",
"variant": "floating",
"value": "Floating",
"placeholder": "Floating",
"options": [{
  value: 'Floating',
  selected: true
}, {
  value: 'Option 2'
}]
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  width: '300px'
}}><DBSelect  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBInfotext,DBStack, type DBStackProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBStack> = {
	title: 'Components/DBStack/Alignment Column',
	component: DBStack,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"variant":{"control":"select","options":["simple","divider"]},"gap":{"control":"select","options":["none","3x-large","2x-large","x-large","large","medium","small","x-small","2x-small","3x-small"]},"direction":{"control":"select","options":["row","column"]},"wrap":{"control":"boolean"},"alignment":{"control":"select","options":["stretch","start","end","center"]},"justifyContent":{"control":"select","options":["space-between","start","end","center"]},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBStack>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const DefaultStretch: Story = {
	args: {
	"alignment": "stretch",
"style": {
  padding: 'var(--db-spacing-fixed-xs)',
  border: 'var(--db-border-width-3xs) dashed var(--db-adaptive-on-bg-basic-emphasis-60-default)'
},
"children":<><span className="dummy-component"><a  href="#">Content 1</a></span><span className="dummy-component">Content 2</span><span className="dummy-component">Content 3</span></>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  alignItems: 'flex-start',
  alignSelf: 'flex-start',
  display: 'flex',
  flexWrap: 'nowrap',
  flexDirection: 'column',
  gap: 'var(--db-spacing-fixed-sm)',
  width: '200px'
}}><DBInfotext  size="small"  icon="none"  semantic="informational">
					(Default) Stretch
				</DBInfotext><DBStack  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const Start: Story = {
	args: {
	"alignment": "start",
"style": {
  padding: 'var(--db-spacing-fixed-xs)',
  border: 'var(--db-border-width-3xs) dashed var(--db-adaptive-on-bg-basic-emphasis-60-default)'
},
"children":<><span className="dummy-component"><a  href="#">Content 1</a></span><span className="dummy-component">Content 2</span><span className="dummy-component">Content 3</span></>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  alignItems: 'flex-start',
  alignSelf: 'flex-start',
  display: 'flex',
  flexWrap: 'nowrap',
  flexDirection: 'column',
  gap: 'var(--db-spacing-fixed-sm)',
  width: '200px'
}}><DBInfotext  size="small"  icon="none"  semantic="informational">
					Start
				</DBInfotext><DBStack  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const Center: Story = {
	args: {
	"alignment": "center",
"style": {
  padding: 'var(--db-spacing-fixed-xs)',
  border: 'var(--db-border-width-3xs) dashed var(--db-adaptive-on-bg-basic-emphasis-60-default)'
},
"children":<><span className="dummy-component"><a  href="#">Content 1</a></span><span className="dummy-component">Content 2</span><span className="dummy-component">Content 3</span></>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  style={{
  alignItems: 'flex-start',
  alignSelf: 'flex-start',
  display: 'flex',
  flexWrap: 'nowrap',
  flexDirection: 'column',
  gap: 'var(--db-spacing-fixed-sm)',
  width: '200px'
}}><DBInfotext  size="small"  icon="none"  semantic="informational">
					Center
				</DBInfotext><DBStack  {...properties}  /></div>
	),
};
export const End: Story = {
	args: {
	"alignment": "end",
"style": {
  padding: 'var(--db-spacing-fixed-xs)',
  border: 'var(--db-border-width-3xs) dashed var(--db-adaptive-on-bg-basic-emphasis-60-default)'
},

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBInfotext,DBStack, type DBStackProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBStack> = {
	title: 'Components/DBStack/Alignment Row',
	component: DBStack,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],

} satisfies Meta<typeof DBStack>;

export default meta;

"direction": "row",
"style": {
  padding: 'var(--db-spacing-fixed-xs)',

},

}}><DBInfotext  size="small"  icon="none"  semantic="informational">

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBInfotext,DBStack, type DBStackProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBStack> = {
	title: 'Components/DBStack/Density',
	component: DBStack,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	
	argTypes: {"variant":{"control":"select","options":["simple","divider"]},"gap":{"control":"select","options":["none","3x-large","2x-large","x-large","large","medium","small","x-small","2x-small","3x-small"]},"direction":{"control":"select","options":["row","column"]},"wrap":{"control":"boolean"},"alignment":{"control":"select","options":["stretch","start","end","center"]},"justifyContent":{"control":"select","options":["space-between","start","end","center"]},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBStack>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const Functional: Story = {
	args: {
	"style": {
  padding: 'var(--db-spacing-fixed-xs)'
},
"children":<><span className="dummy-component"><a  href="#">Content 1</a></span><span className="dummy-component">Content 2</span><span className="dummy-component">Content 3</span></>
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<div  data-density="functional"  style={{
  alignItems: 'flex-start',
  alignSelf: 'flex-start',
  display: 'flex',
  flexWrap: 'nowrap',
  flexDirection: 'column',
  gap: 'var(--db-spacing-fixed-sm)',
  width: '200px'

  alignSelf: 'flex-start',

  width: '200px'

},

import { DBInfotext,DBStack, type DBStackProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBStack> = {
	title: 'Components/DBStack/Gap',
	component: DBStack,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],

} satisfies Meta<typeof DBStack>;

},

import { DBInfotext,DBStack, type DBStackProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBStack> = {
	title: 'Components/DBStack/Justify Content Column',
	component: DBStack,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],

} satisfies Meta<typeof DBStack>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const DefaultStart: Story = {
	args: {
	"justifyContent": "start",
"style": {
  padding: 'var(--db-spacing-fixed-xs)',
  border: 'var(--db-border-width-3xs) dashed var(--db-adaptive-on-bg-basic-emphasis-60-default)'

  height: '200px'

import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite';

import { DBTag, type DBTagProps } from '@components';
import { fn } from 'storybook/test';

const meta: Meta<typeof DBTag> = {
	title: 'Components/DBTag/Behavior',
	component: DBTag,
	
	parameters: {
		layout: 'centered'
	},
	tags: ['autodocs'],
	args: {
	"onRemove": fn()
	},
	argTypes: {"emphasis":{"control":"select","options":["weak","strong"]},"semantic":{"control":"select","options":["adaptive","neutral","critical","informational","warning","successful"]},"behavior":{"control":"select","options":["static","removable"]},"showIcon":{"control":"boolean"},"noText":{"control":"boolean"},"content":{"control":"text"},"showCheckState":{"control":"boolean"},"overflow":{"control":"boolean"},"removeButton":{"control":"text"},"text":{"control":"text"},"value":{"control":"text"},"id":{"control":"text"},"autofocus":{"control":"boolean"},"onRemove":{"action":"onRemove"}}
} satisfies Meta<typeof DBTag>;

export default meta;
type Story = StoryObj;
export const DefaultStatic: Story = {
	args: {
	"children":"(Default) Static"
	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBTag  {...properties}  />
	),
};
export const Removable: Story = {

	"behavior": "removable",

	},
	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBTag  {...properties}  />
	),
};

	render: (properties: any) => (
		<DBTag  {...properties}  />
	),
};

	"onRemove": fn()

"icon": "x_placeholder",
